profile.name: Reynord Joshua K
profile.roleLine: MBA Finance Candidate | Financial Analyst | Dashboard Developer
profile.heroDescription: I build financial dashboards, valuation models, and forecasting tools — combining Advanced Excel, Python, Power BI, and Tableau with modern web technology to turn financial statements into decisions people can act on in seconds.

paragraphs: I'm currently pursuing my MBA in Finance and Operations at PES University, on top of a Bachelor of Commerce in Accounting and Finance from the University of Mysore. Along the way I've built hands-on experience in financial statement analysis, valuation, financial modeling, and dashboard development.

As a Finance Intern at the Karnataka Milk Federation (KMF), I ran ratio, liquidity, and working-capital analysis, built forecasting and scenario models in Excel, and used Python for sensitivity and Monte Carlo risk analysis — then shipped an interactive dashboard so the findings were usable, not just accurate.

My goal: a full-time Finance Analyst role where I can sit at the intersection of finance and analytics — modeling the numbers, then building the tools that make them legible to a room full of decision-makers.

education.detail: MBA — Finance and Operations · Present · Bengaluru, India
B.Com — Accounting and Finance · Jul 2024 · Mysuru, India

bullets: Deepening core skills in corporate finance, valuation, and financial statement analysis.
Applying coursework directly to independent dashboard and modeling projects.

experience.org: Karnataka Cooperative Milk Producers Federation (KMF) · Bangalore
bullets: Performed financial statement, ratio, liquidity, and working-capital analysis.
Built financial forecasting and scenario-analysis models in Excel.
Conducted sensitivity and Monte Carlo risk analysis using Python.
Developed an interactive financial dashboard using Python and VS Code.
Automated data processing and validation, improving reporting accuracy.
Generated KPI dashboards and management reports for decision support.
Designed and shipped two live finance projects — a forecasting dashboard and a valuation website.
Owned the process end-to-end: data structuring, modeling, UI, and deployment.
Looking to join a team where financial modeling meets applied analytics and dashboard tooling.
